---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

What you were trying to do, and where the current behavior falls short.

## Proposed change

What you'd like `shelf` to do instead. Concrete examples — a CLI flag, a hypothesis type, a config option — are more useful than abstract goals.

## Alternatives you've considered

If you've thought about other ways to solve this, mention them.

## Additional context

Screenshots, logs, links to related issues — anything that helps. (No actual API keys, please.)
